summary: CRITICAL: Deliverable is fundamentally incomplete. Task explicitly requires: (1) red/green TDD test files using Pester, (2) test fixtures (sample JUnit XML, JSON), (3) entire test harness running through `act`, (4) act-result.txt artifact with verified output—NONE OF THESE ARE PROVIDED. Workflow has best-practice violation: action reference `actions/checkout@v4` not pinned to full commit SHA (task requires 40-char SHA + date comment). PowerShell scripts themselves well-written (Set-StrictMode, proper error handling, clear structure) but untestable without accompanying test suite. Missing: *.Tests.ps1 file, fixtures/ directory, act validation loop, comprehensive test cases for each function.
